source_jobs.title: Product Engineering
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT NOMOS

We strive to make energy free for European households. We achieve this by developing new energy products with Europe’s leading technology companies and embed energy as a cost-saving feature for electric vehicles, heat pumps, battery storage systems and more.




ABOUT THE TEAM

Started by Stefan and Nils in 2024, the Nomos team now consists of former researchers, founders and senior engineers united by a deep frustration of the current energy system and the vision to build a category leading enterprise out of Europe.

We strive to build a strong culture of effective communication, ownership and belonging. In this critical phase of our venture this translates to working in-person in Berlin Mitte with a group of people that value meritocracy, curiosity and craftsmanship.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Live the product. You'll sit with customers, dissect their problems, and develop a deep intuition for what we need to build to deliver a different and delightful user experience. Then you'll ship it, end-to-end, across the entire stack.

 - Ship like a team of five. Software engineering is changing at a radical pace and most people haven't caught up. We run an AI-native codebase and expect you to use tools like Claude Code and Cursor as force multipliers, not nice-to-haves. A single engineer at Nomos should ship what used to require a whole team a year ago. We think that's incredibly exciting. If that sounds too intense, we might not be the best fit.

 - Own zero-to-one problems. Whether it's architecting a dunning process from scratch or re-engineering our customer portal to reduce energy costs and cut support volume. You'll take full ownership from problem discovery to production.

 - Curate, don't just execute. Raw implementation is getting commoditized by AI. The hard part is now judgment: which problems actually matter, what the right solution looks like, and whether the outcome moves the needle. You operate like an editor with an army of builders at your fingertips not like a developer waiting for a ticket. The bottleneck is taste, not throughput.




RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Solve the problems that make or break an energy retailer: billing, procurement, customer retention, cost optimization. Turn them into experiences that feel intuitive and delightful.

 - Develop taste for what to build and what to skip. Evaluate outcomes ruthlessly. Kill your darlings if necessary.

 - Shape our engineering culture, tooling, and processes. Help recruit and raise the bar for the core engineering team.

 - Adapt fast. The tools and methods that work today won't be the ones that work in six months. Stay on the frontier and bring the team with you.
   
   


WHO YOU ARE

 - You've built something real. We don't filter by years of experience. We assess you by what you've shipped. Maybe you built a core product at a place where the engineering bar was genuinely high (like Dennis https://www.linkedin.com/in/dennis-thanner/). Maybe you built a successful open-source project (like Max https://github.com/openstatusHQ/openstatus), or advanced research in a domain you're passionate about (like Moritz https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/40317534/). We'd love to see your work, not just your resume.

 - You thrive in ambiguity. At our stage, half the job is figuring out what the job is. You're energized by that, not paralyzed.

 - You want your work to reach people. What we build directly shapes how millions of Europeans consume and pay for energy. You want to work on problems that touch everyday life and make the energy transition actually work.

 - You hold yourself to a higher standard than anyone else could. You take extreme ownership. You're allergic to mediocrity. You'd rather work through nights to get something right than ship something you're not proud of.

 - You want a seat at the table, not just a seat on the team. We are a very small team. Every engineer has an outsized impact on what we build, how we build it, and where the company goes. We w

source_jobs.title: Backend Engineering
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT NOMOS

We strive to make energy free for European households. We achieve this by developing new energy products with Europe’s leading technology companies and embed energy as a cost-saving feature for electric vehicles, heat pumps, battery storage systems and more.




ABOUT THE TEAM

Started by Stefan and Nils in 2024, the Nomos team now consists of former researchers, founders and senior engineers united by a deep frustration of the current energy system and the vision to build a category leading enterprise out of Europe.

We strive to build a strong culture of effective communication, ownership and belonging. In this critical phase of our venture this translates to working in-person in Berlin Mitte with a group of people that value meritocracy, curiosity and craftsmanship.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Architect for the next order of magnitude. Nomos runs its own operating system: a modular billing engine, energy-market communication protocols, and a full accounting ledger. Every time we 10x our customers base, complexity increases significantly. Your job is to keep the architecture ahead of the growth, not chasing it.

 - Reduce complexity, don't manage it. The energy market is full of edge cases, legacy protocols, and shifting regulation. You deal with the complexity by approaching problems on high granularity and delivering clean abstractions. We measure complexity by how hard it is to ship the next feature. Your job is to make that number go down.

 - Move fast by building it right. We don't see speed and quality as a tradeoff. Cutting corners just means paying interest later. Invest to get it right the first time so the team moves faster in the months to come.

 - Raise the bar. You'll set engineering standards, review critical code, and hold the team accountable. When someone wants to merge a shortcut, you push back. When a pattern starts to erode, you catch it. This is a core part of the job, not a side responsibility.
   
   


RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Design and evolve the systems that power Nomos: billing, procurement, metering, partner integrations, and the data pipelines that connect them.

 - Build for correctness, performance, and resilience. Always ask how something behaves at 100x - 1,000x the current load.

 - Use AI tools to accelerate where it makes sense: boilerplate, test generation, repetitive patterns. But own the architecture and the decisions. AI writes code. You decide what gets built and why.

 - Shape our engineering culture, tooling, and CI. Help recruit engineers who meet the bar you set.
   
   


WHO YOU ARE

 - You've seen what scale looks like. You've operated backend systems at meaningful scale and know the difference between something that works in dev and something that holds up in production. You've felt the pain of bad abstractions and you build to avoid it.

 - You think in systems, not endpoints. You care about boundaries, data flow, and how things fail. You default to clean separation and explicit contracts, not because it's trendy, but because you've seen what happens without it.

 - You thrive in ambiguity. At our stage, half the job is figuring out what the job is. You're energized by that, not paralyzed.

 - You want your work to reach people. What we build directly shapes how millions of Europeans consume and interact with energy. You want to work on problems that touch everyday life and make the energy transition actually work.

 - You want a seat at the table, not just a seat on the team. We are a very small team. Every engineer has an outsized impact on what we build, how we build it, and where the company goes. You'll shape Nomos, not just work on it.
   
   


WHY JOIN US?

 - As an early member of our team you will shape the foundation of our company and benefit from the financial upside accordingly

 - Solve complex challenges powering Europe's energy infrastructure

 - No politics, instead passion, speed and customer obsession

 - We have a clear vision to radically transfor

source_jobs.title: Business Operations
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT NOMOS

We strive to make energy free for European households. We achieve this by developing new energy products with Europe’s leading technology companies and embed energy as a cost-saving feature for electric vehicles, heat pumps, battery storage systems and more.




ABOUT THE TEAM

Started by Stefan and Nils in 2024, the Nomos team now consists of former researchers, founders and senior engineers united by a deep frustration of the current energy system and the vision to build a category leading enterprise out of Europe.

We strive to build a strong culture of effective communication, ownership and belonging. In this critical phase of our venture this translates to working in-person in Berlin Mitte with a group of people that value meritocracy, curiosity and craftsmanship.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

TL,DR: Craft and expand the operational backbone of our company so the rest of the team can focus on building product.

Own the foundations. Finance, legal, recruiting, operations - you'll build the core functions that fuel our growth. You'll figure out what great looks like, set it up, hire someone better than you for the role, and move on to the next thing.

Execute the ordinary extraordinarily well. We're building a full-stack power company with a lean team. With that comes a flood of opportunities, challenges, and competing priorities. Your job is to prioritize clearly, execute effectively and keep Nomos running.

Be a force of nature. When something matters, you move on it. Fast, thoroughly, and to a standard you're proud of. You work fast without cutting corners.




WHO YOU ARE

We are primarily interested in your motivation and ability to grow. We value grit and ambition above experience and expertise. While there is no perfect candidate, the points below give you an indication of what we are looking for:

You learn unreasonably fast. You can go from knowing nothing about a domain to understanding what great looks like within days. You talk to people who've done it before, think from first principles, and then execute with conviction.

Your working style could be described as “kind and charming but ruthless”. You build trust quickly and people enjoy working with you. But when something needs to get done, you don't let politeness get in the way of progress.

You are allergic to phrases like “that’s how things are done around here”, “that’s not possible” and “no”.

You care deeply. You notice the broken process nobody mentioned. You don't care if something is "your job" or not. If it matters, you own it.

You've proven yourself in a high-performance environment. 2+ years in a high-growth startup, professional sports, investment banking, or high-end hospitality. Somewhere where the pace was relentless and excuses didn't fly. German fluency (C1+) is required.




WHY JOIN US?

 - As an early member of our team you will shape the foundation of our company and benefit from the financial upside accordingly

 - Solve complex challenges powering Europe's energy infrastructure

 - No politics, instead passion, speed and customer obsession

 - We have a clear vision to radically transform one of the world's largest industries by building a category leader from Europe

 - Create the culture you always wanted. Actively shape our processes, setup and the way how we get things done

source_jobs.title: Member of Technical Staff
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT NOMOS

We strive to make energy free for European households. We achieve this by developing new energy products with Europe’s leading technology companies and embed energy as a cost-saving feature for electric vehicles, heat pumps, battery storage systems and more.




ABOUT THE TEAM

Started by Stefan and Nils in 2024, the Nomos team now consists of former researchers, founders and senior engineers united by a deep frustration of the current energy system and the vision to build a category leading enterprise out of Europe.

We strive to build a strong culture of effective communication, ownership and belonging. In this critical phase of our venture this translates to working in-person in Berlin Mitte with a group of people that value meritocracy, curiosity and craftsmanship.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

Nomos faces an abundance of complex technical challenges. We're building a full-stack energy provider from scratch. The surface area is large and our current roles reflect the challenges we've prioritized. If you believe you can help us deal with complexity outside these roles, this job description is for you.

Some of the problems on our radar: AI-powered customer support that actually resolves issues. Procurement forecasting. Real-time trading optimization. Data infrastructure that scales with a rapidly growing customer base.

You'll own problems end-to-end. We'll figure out together where your skills create the most leverage, then you take it from problem discovery to production. You use AI tools as force multipliers, but the judgment is yours.

Your scope will shift. You'll help shape engineering culture, tooling, and processes alongside your core work. What matters most in month one will look different than in month six. That's expected.




WHO YOU ARE

You've built something real. We don't filter by title, years, or discipline. We assess you by what you've done. Maybe you built critical infrastructure for a fast-growing venture. Maybe you published research that changed how people think about a problem. Maybe you shipped a product on nights and weekends that people use. Show us.

You don't fit our other roles, but you know you belong here. Your best work has happened at the intersection of disciplines, or in a role that didn't exist before you showed up. You've been the person who saw a problem no one else owned and just solved it.

You're deeply technical. Whether your craft is systems engineering, data, ML, infrastructure, security, or something else, you're dissatisfied with surface-level problem solving. You go deep. You have strong opinions about how things should be built, earned by experience.

You thrive in ambiguity. At our stage, half the job is figuring out what the job is. You're energized by that, not paralyzed.

You want your work to reach people. What we build directly shapes how millions of Europeans consume and pay for energy. You want to work on problems that touch everyday life and make the energy transition actually work.

You want a seat at the table, not just a seat on the team. We are a very small team. Every person has an outsized impact on what we build, how we build it, and where the company goes. You'll shape Nomos, not just work on it.




WHY JOIN US?

 - As an early member of our team you will shape the foundation of our company and benefit from the financial upside accordingly

 - Solve complex challenges powering Europe's energy infrastructure

 - No politics, instead passion, speed and customer obsession

 - We have a clear vision to radically transform one of the world's largest industries by building a category leader from Europe

 - Create the culture you always wanted. Actively shape our processes, setup and the way how we get things done

source_jobs.title: Energy Operations
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT NOMOS

We strive to make energy free for European households. We achieve this by developing new energy products with Europe’s leading technology companies and embed energy as a cost-saving feature for electric vehicles, heat pumps, battery storage systems and more.




ABOUT THE TEAM

Started by Stefan and Nils in 2024, the Nomos team now consists of former researchers, founders and senior engineers united by a deep frustration of the current energy system and the vision to build a category leading enterprise out of Europe.

We strive to build a strong culture of effective communication, ownership and belonging. In this critical phase of our venture this translates to working in-person in Berlin Mitte with a group of people that value meritocracy, curiosity and craftsmanship.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

Make it look easy. Scaling a full-service electricity retailer is no small feat. You will be pivotal in servicing our customers (aka getting your hands dirty), defining core processes and ultimately delivering simplicity by dealing with the underlying complexity.

Own special projects from day one. Whether it's improving internal processes, handling critical ops tasks, or tackling one-off challenges, you’ll have the autonomy to own initiatives end-to-end and execute fast & effectively.

 - Own our energy infrastructure processes, managing relationships with grid operators, energy suppliers and transmission system operators.

 - You’re the person between a signup and a happy customer: Monitor Nomos OS, troubleshoot clearing cases and define processes for effective operations.

 - Build automations to simplify procurement and customer service processes.

 - Be a learning machine! We want you to grow with us and solve hard challenges that lie outside your comfort zone.
   


WHO YOU ARE

We are primarily interested in your motivation and ability to grow. We value grit and ambition above experience and expertise. While there is no perfect candidate, the points below give you an indication of what we are looking for:

 - You are allergic to phrases like “that’s how things are done around here”, “that’s not possible” and “no”.

 - Your working style could be described as “kind and charming but ruthless”

 - You think, communicate and execute in a structured way

 - You take extreme ownership of ideas and drive projects to completion

 - You’ve proven yourself in a high performance environment with work experience in operations, investment banking or hospitality.

 - You are excited about solving complex energy challenges that help drive our generation forward
   
   


WHY JOIN US?

 - As an early member of our team you will shape the foundation of our company and benefit from the financial upside accordingly

 - Solve complex challenges powering Europe's energy infrastructure

 - No politics, instead passion, speed and customer obsession

 - We have a clear vision to radically transform one of the world's largest industries by building a category leader from Europe

 - Create the culture you always wanted. Actively shape our processes, setup and the way how we get things done

source_jobs.title: Member of Commercial Staff
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT NOMOS

We strive to make energy free for European households. We achieve this by developing new energy products with Europe’s leading technology companies and embed energy as a cost-saving feature for electric vehicles, heat pumps, battery storage systems and more.




ABOUT THE TEAM

Started by Stefan and Nils in 2024, the Nomos team now consists of former researchers, founders and senior engineers united by a deep frustration of the current energy system and the vision to build a category leading enterprise out of Europe.

We strive to build a strong culture of effective communication, ownership and belonging. In this critical phase of our venture this translates to working in-person in Berlin Mitte with a group of people that value meritocracy, curiosity and craftsmanship.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

Running a full-stack energy retailer requires more than engineering. Finance, legal, recruiting, customer support, regulatory & partner management: the commercial surface area grows with every customer we onboard. Our current roles reflect the challenges we've prioritized. If you believe you can help us deal with complexity outside these roles, this job description is for you. Some of the challenges on our radar: scaling recruiting as we grow, building legal infrastructure for a regulated industry, designing customer support that actually delights, managing an increasingly complex partner landscape.

You'll own problems end-to-end. We'll figure out together where your skills create the most leverage, then you take it from scoping to execution. Fast, thoroughly, and to a standard you're proud of.

Your scope will shift. You'll help shape how we operate alongside your core work. What matters most in month one will look different in month six. That's expected.




WHO YOU ARE

We are primarily interested in your motivation and ability to grow. We value grit and ambition above experience and expertise. While there is no perfect candidate, the points below give you an indication of what we are looking for:

 - You don't fit our other roles, but you know you belong here. Maybe your background is in banking, maybe it's in legal, maybe it's something we haven't thought of. You've looked at what we're building and you see where you can make a difference.

 - You learn unreasonably fast. You can go from knowing nothing about a domain to understanding what great looks like within days. You talk to people who've done it before, think from first principles, and then execute with conviction.

 - Your working style could be described as "kind and charming but ruthless". You build trust quickly and people enjoy working with you. But when something needs to get done, you don't let politeness get in the way of progress.

 - You are allergic to phrases like "that's how things are done around here", "that's not possible" and "no".

 - You care deeply. You notice the broken process nobody mentioned. You don't care if something is "your job" or not. If it matters, you own it.

 - You've proven yourself in a high-performance environment. 2+ years in a high-growth startup, consulting, professional sports, investment banking, or high-end hospitality. Somewhere where the pace was relentless and excuses didn't fly. German fluency (C1+) is required.
   
   


WHY JOIN US?

 - As an early member of our team you will shape the foundation of our company and benefit from the financial upside accordingly

 - Solve complex challenges powering Europe's energy infrastructure

 - No politics, instead passion, speed and customer obsession

 - We have a clear vision to radically transform one of the world's largest industries by building a category leader from Europe

 - Create the culture you always wanted. Actively shape our processes, setup and the way how we get things done

notes: Energy-focused startup with strong engineering core
